name: codex-rtl-toolkit
description: RTL rendering fixes for Arabic-script languages and English in Codex after the ChatGPT Desktop update.

scripts.check: node --check desktop/inject.mjs && node --check src/injected.js && node --check scripts/sync-extension.mjs && node --check scripts/check-extension-sync.mjs && node --check extension/injected.js && node scripts/check-extension-sync.mjs && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/check-powershell.ps1
